headline: Kohl’s Earnings Beat Expectations. Why the Stock Is Dropping.
summary: Kohl’s  stock fell Tuesday after the retailer reported a larger-than-expected decline in sales for its fiscal fourth quarter.  The company posted adjusted earnings of $1.07 a share for the quarter ended Jan. 31, above analysts’ consensus estimate of 86 cents, per FactSet.  Comparable sales decreased 2.8%, compared to the 1.5% drop analysts had expected.

raw.headline: Kohl’s Earnings Beat Expectations. Why the Stock Is Dropping.

Comparable sales decreased 2.8%, compared to the 1.5% drop analysts had expected.
